page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: fqtrim is a versatile stand-alone utility that can be used to trim adapters, poly-A tails, terminal unknown bases (Ns) and low quality 3' regions in reads from high-throughput next-generation sequencing machines.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Utility for filtering and trimming high-throughput next-gen reads.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Utility for filtering and trimming high-throughput next-gen reads.
